summary: Spec is implementation-ready. Overview identifies the precise surface being extended (Page, Locator, expect matchers) and lists all 27 gaps grouped logically (R1-R10 Page methods, R11-R19 Locator methods, R20-R27 matchers). Out-of-scope is explicit (network interception, video, accessibility, multi-context, file uploads, mobile emulation, session persistence, service workers). Requirements R1-R27 are each testable with text describing the target Playwright-compatible API, CDP binding (when applicable), and risk. Scenarios section maps to requirements. Logic flowchart captures the polling FSM (100ms interval, 5s timeout default, lastError/lastValue tracking) and partitions methods by CDP round-trip vs pure-JS evaluation. Test Plan uses a requirementDiagram linking every requirement to a test. Changes block is concrete: runtime/test/page.js modifications, new runtime/test/matchers.js module (keeps index.js under the 1000-line threshold), PageRequest enum + handler additions in crates/jet/src/cdp_driver/page_binding.rs, index.js matcher wiring, and a new integration test file crates/jet/tests/page_api_parity.rs using the chromium_available() guard pattern. Alignment warnings for non-applicable typed section placeholders were pruned. Minor inconsistency noted (T1-T34 in Changes description vs R1-R27 requirements) but does not block approval — implementation will produce 27+ tests with helpers/fixtures as needed.
